title: Verify the published INGEST operation contract
steps: Invoke schema discovery and all eight operations through the published binary using private stdin/file JSON; exercise success and every stable failure category; inspect stdout, stderr, exits, offline behavior, cancellation, and process lifetime.
expected: Descriptors, schemas, limits, errors, and exits remain versioned and consistent; each invocation emits one stdout envelope; stderr is metadata-only; unknown fields fail before processing; no prompt, daemon, network call, or orphan process appears.
